productDisplayName: Timberland Men's Asortd Strp Pique Polo Blue T-Shirt

Made of organic cotton, in summery colors, it will keep you dry and comfortable all through the day. Pair it with jeans or cargos, and get a look worth killing for.This shirt has been manufactured in an environment-friendly manner, with the aim to reduce the Carbon FootprintModel statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
